subject: New Opening: Web Developer – PHP
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Bankry, a company in the fintech space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Web Developer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• PHP
• GCP
• RabbitMQ

Practical details:
• Start: 2025-04-07
• Duration: 3 months
• Location: Malmö (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 700 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Sofia Larsson
Tech Recruiter
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 73 789 01 23
